📅 Day of Procedure

  • Clear liquids are allowed up until {{NPO_CLEARS_HOURS}} hours before the procedure — nothing by mouth after that. No solid food the day of.
  • Offer small sips of clear liquids every 30–60 minutes through the prep day. Each drink: no more than {{HTML_DRINK_CUP}}.
  • Bring comfort items for your child (toy, blanket, tablet, etc.).
